calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Estate
Off Calendar Mar-20-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-16-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Administrator

Ms. Ng cited Probate Code 12540, stated that she has been in touch with counsel in New York, they don't want to mix funds with personal funds, the beneficiary and Personal Representative are one and same, and for the funds to be distributed to New York then distributed to herself. The First and Final Report on Waiver of Account, etc. is Taken Under Submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
